response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack work, including recent, directly relevant experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS, plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development — a rare match for the JD's agent-development requirement. His deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and conference talks suggest strong engineering rigor and communication. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python experience, but his demonstrated polyglot range (Java, C/C++, D, Swift, PHP) makes these learnable rather than disqualifying.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, AWS
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generation work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Exceptional testing pedigree: TDD practitioner, author of open-source test frameworks, and instructor of testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, which is a primary framework in the target stack
Kotlin and Python, both listed as required languages, do not appear in his skills or work history
Education dates overlap with concurrent full-time employment in other countries, which merits clarification

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python exposure
